@Vikas, Can you try a redeploy of this in the windriver labs in case the SMS issue is resolved there ?

Patch Set 1:

Tested in OOF tenant in the integration lab. After redeploying the AAF components(triggering the secret preload process again), OOF pods are all up and running.
